[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 7/11 (Tue)!

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 7/11 (Tue) 2:00 – 7/25 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
